name: END_c
description: Legacy Termination Block - terminates simulation at a predefined final time
xmlExample:
<BasicBlock interfaceFunctionName="END_c" blockType="d" dependsOnU="0" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName="scicosexit" simulationFunctionType="C_OR_FORTRAN" style="END_c">
  <ScilabString as="exprs" height="1" width="1">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="100000000"/>
  </ScilabString>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" width="40.0" height="40.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
criticalRules: Immediately stops simulation when triggered by event
